CustomField.description: Leave blank for All/Any(including blanks) or Enter states(s) used in this rule. Multiple values are comma separated (no spaces needed after comma). Use a hyphen before a value to denote any value except
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Leave blank for All/Any(including blanks) or Enter states(s) used in this rule. Multiple values are comma separated (no spaces needed after comma). Use a hyphen before a value to denote any value except
CustomField.label: State
